AUTH.DELETE_ACCOUNT_WARNING: You're about to delete your account.
AUTH.DELETE_ACCOUNT_VERIFICATION_MSG: For verification, please enter your email below and click the 'Delete' button.
AUTH.EMAIL_INPUT_INVALID: Please enter a valid email address
AUTH.RESET_PW_MSG: Type in your email address. We will send you a link for resetting your password.
AUTH.ACCESS_DENIED_MSG: You don’t have permission to view this page. If you believe this is a mistake, please contact your administrator.
AUTH.PW_RESET_SUCCESS: A passwort reset was sent to the given mail address.
AUTH.PW_RESET_ERROR: Could not reset the password. Please contact the support via email.
AUTH.NO_LOGIN_ERROR: No login found for the given information. Please check your inputs and try again.
AUTH.EMAIL_CONFIRMED_MSG: Email confirmed successfully. You can now close this window.
AUTH.EMAIL_CONFIRM_FAILED_MSG: Something went wrong confirming your email. Please contact the support via email.

PRODUCTS.NO_ID_FOUND_MSG: No permissible Product ID found. Please try again...
